      public ClientOptions.Builder addHeader(String key, Supplier<String> value)

    • timeout

      public ClientOptions.Builder timeout(int timeout)
      Override the timeout in seconds. Defaults to 60 seconds.

    • timeout

      public ClientOptions.Builder timeout(Optional<Integer> timeout)
      Override the timeout in seconds. Defaults to 60 seconds.

    • maxRetries

      public ClientOptions.Builder maxRetries(int maxRetries)
      Override the maximum number of retries. Defaults to 2 retries.
